raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "(Zittkahrt tappe ta' fazzih̅te
eeksch Israëta/ kad kas gahje Dee-
wu waizahrt/ Nahzeet/ eima pee
ta Redsetaja/ jo kas tchod̅een par
Praweetu faukts tob̅/ tas tap-
pezittkahrt parRedsetaju faukts.)"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Sauls us sa-
twu Puissi: Taws Wahrd̅s irr
labs/ nahz/ eima/ un tee gahje us
to Pilsfahtu/ kur tas Deewa
Wihrs bija."
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tee nu uskahpe us
Pilsfahta Treppehm/ tad fastap-
pe teem zittas Meitas/ kas ts-
gahje uhd̅eni finelt/ un teefazzija
us tahm: Irrag tas Redsetajs
scheitan?"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tahs atbildeja winneem/
un fazzija: Rangt/ fche patt
wiꞥſch irraid/ steidsees tad/ jo
wiꞥſch irr schodeen Pilsfah̅tā
nahzis/ tapehz ka schodeen teem
Laudim ja-uppure us Augstunu."
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad juhs Pilsfah̅tā nahk-
feet/ tad juhs winnu atraffeet/
pirms wiꞥſch us Augstunu kahpj
pee Ehdeena: Jo tee Laudis ne-
chdih̅s/ teekams wiꞥſch nahk/ jo
wiꞥſch twehti to Uppuri/ pehz to
chd tee Aizinatee/ tapehz zelleetees
uu/ jo juhs winnu schodeen at-
raffeet."
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee gahje Pilsfah̅tā/
un Pilsfah̅ta Widdû nahkoht/
rangi/ tad isgahje Samuels teem
pretti/ gribbedams us Aug-
stunu cet."
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS bij Sa-"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "mneka Auskm pastah̅stijs weenu
Deenu papreekshu/ pirins ka
Sauls atnahze/ fazzidams:
16. Riht av scho Laiku fuhti
schu es pee teiwis weenu Wihr̅
no Benjamina Seines/ to buhe-
tew par Walditaju fwaidiht pab̅-
manneem Israëta Laudim/ jo
wiꞥſch ispestihs mannis Laudis
no to Wilisteru Kohkas/ jo es ef-
mu usluhkojis mannis Laudis/
tapehz ka winnu Brehkfchanaire
pce man nahkuti.
17. Kad nu Samuels to San-
lu redseja/ tad atbildeja tam tas
KUNGS: Reds/ tas irr tas
Wihrs/ no ka es teiw fazziju/
schim buhs pahr manneem Lau-
dim waldiht.
18. Un Sauls peegahje pee
Samueta appaksh Wahrtim/
un fazzija: Pasakki man/ luh-
dsams/ kur irr sche ta Redsetaja
Nams?
19. Tad atbildeja Samuels
Saulam/ uu fazzija: Es esmu
tas Redsetajs/ eij mannā Preek-
schā us Augstunu/ ka juhs scho-
deem ar mannim ehdat/ tad griƀ-
bu es tew riht agri atlaist/ un
wiffu/ kas tawa Sirdi irr/ griƀ-
bu es tew fazzih̅t.
20. Jo tahs Ehsēta-Mahtes/
kas tew aiswakar suddnschas/
pahr tahm ne behdajes wairs/
jo tahs irr atrastas. Un kam buhs
wifs Israëta Labbuins? neggi
taws un wiffa tawa Tehwa
Namma?
21. Tad atbildeja Sauls un
Vivv z"
    }
  ],
